description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle was stopped in manual mode while exiting the intersection of Montgomery St. and Pacific St. as a large truck entered the 
intersection. While the truck began to make a left turn behind the Zoox vehicle, it made contact with the Zoox rear radar and camera pod on 
the driver's side. There were no injuries and the police were not called.
Print
Clear Form
